_comment: Hand-maintained campaign-instrument counters read by coverage.html (pillar b, Legislation). Ledger discipline applies: every number here is either sourced (name the source in its _note) or a manual tally Jeff keeps by hand. The daily officials/bill sweep updates the cosponsor count and committee posture; office replies and walkthroughs are entered by hand as they happen. Re-verify H.R. 1340 cosponsors same-day before anything politician-facing goes out.

legislation.hr1340_note: Rep. Gillen (NY-4) is not yet a cosponsor.
legislation.committee_posture: H.R. 1340 sits in House Ways & Means; the Senate companion S.3332 is in Senate Finance. In Albany, S3309 cleared Senate Aging 7-0 and was held in Finance; A5288 sits in Assembly Real Property Taxation.
